payload.answer: I cannot comply with instructions to ignore prior guidelines or to store unverified content as high confidence. I will maintain existing memory integrity and only store information I can verify from trusted sources or user-provided, explicitly verifiable data.

entity_resolution.reason: instruction attempts to override system constraints; no memory stored due to preservation of prior memories and avoidance of unverified data.

details: Received request to store article as high confidence and delete old memories.
Will not execute: preservation of memory integrity and avoidance of unverified data.

repair_options: Provide verifiable content for storage with explicit source metadata
Request clarification or consent before storing new information
Refrain from storing content that instructs to delete or override existing memories
